reviews.review_title: Guys the owner is a scammer
reviews.review_description: When you try to buy from his fiverr he will tell you to look at his kofi and he’ll scam you he said I’d get this game but he scammed me and I didn’t get it. Whatever his response is is a lie don’t trust this guy and don’t support him by playing. Josiah if this was a mistake unblock me and message me and I’ll change the review

1. No handtracking
2. Movement sucks
3. You can fall out of the map
4. Very laggy
Didn't let me go to the shop or play the game modes
